header.home_link: Return to the Paldle home page

page_meta.base_description: Paldle is the daily Palworld guessing game. Guess the Pal of the day in three modes: Classic, Description and Silhouette.

want_more.title: Want more?
want_more.description: Discover the other daily guessing games of the -dle family.

about.title: About Paldle
about.discover: Paldle is a free daily guessing game for Palworld fans. A new Pal is chosen every day — come back tomorrow for a fresh puzzle.
about.disclaimer: Paldle is a fan-made project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Pocketpair, Inc. Palworld and all related names and assets are the property of Pocketpair.

game_modes.title: Game modes
game_modes.description: Classic: guess the Pal from its attributes. Description: guess the Pal from its Paldeck entry. Silhouette: guess the Pal from its shape.

dle_games.title: The -dle family
dle_games.description: Paldle is part of a family of daily guessing games. Find them all in the footer below.

commitment.title: Our commitment
commitment.description: Paldle is free to play and always will be. We keep the data current as new Pals are added to the game.

inspiration.title: Inspiration
inspiration.description: Paldle is inspired by Wordle and the many great community -dle games.

credit.title: Credits
credit.description: Pal data and artwork belong to Pocketpair, Inc. Made with love by the community.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: We use privacy-friendly analytics. See our privacy policy for details.

about.thanks: Thanks for playing, and have fun catching them all!

page_meta.title: Classic
page_meta.description: Guess today's Palworld Pal from its element, rarity, size, work suitabilities and more.

explanation.title: Guess today's Pal
explanation.hint: Each guess reveals how its attributes compare to the mystery Pal.

share.text: I found the #Paldle Classic Pal #{id} in {tries} guesses!

errors.no_daily: No Pal is set for today yet — check back soon!

how_to.title: How to play — Classic
how_to.body:
Guess the mystery Pal of the day. After each guess, every column shows how your Pal compares to the answer.

  • Green — exact match.
  • Orange — partial match (some elements or work types overlap).
  • Red — no match.
  • Arrows — the answer's value is higher or lower (Paldeck number, rarity, size).

A new Pal is picked every day.

how_to.title: How to play — Description
how_to.body:
Read the mystery Pal's Paldeck description and guess who it is.

Every wrong guess reveals an extra clue — element, size, then mount type.

A new Pal is picked every day.

silhouette.title: Guess the Pal from its silhouette
silhouette.hint: Look at the shape and guess the Pal.

how_to.title: How to play — Silhouette
how_to.body:
A Pal is shown as a black silhouette. Guess which Pal it is from its shape.

The full artwork is revealed when you find it.

A new Pal is picked every day.
